headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Delta Falls On Earnings; Micron, Sandisk Slide As SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion
summary: Delta fell on earnings. Memory giant SK Hynix is set for its Nasdaq debut after a huge offering as peers Micron and Sandisk dipped.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Delta Falls On Earnings; Micron, Sandisk Slide As SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion
raw.summary: Delta fell on earnings. Memory giant SK Hynix is set for its Nasdaq debut after a huge offering as peers Micron and Sandisk dipped.

headline: Cadence Design Sys Inc (NASDAQ:CDNS) Scores High Technical Rating and Setup Quality for Potential Breakout
summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) scores a strong technical rating of 7 and a near-perfect setup quality score of 9, signaling a coiled spring pattern for a potential technical breakout.

raw.headline: Cadence Design Sys Inc (NASDAQ:CDNS) Scores High Technical Rating and Setup Quality for Potential Breakout

headline: Dow Jones Futures: SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion After Micron, Sandisk Jump, Nasdaq Tops Key Level
summary: Micron and Sandisk soared as the Nasdaq reclaimed key support, but are they actionable? Delta, Taiwan Semi, SK Hynix loom.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures: SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion After Micron, Sandisk Jump, Nasdaq Tops Key Level
